<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Amélia Blondin — Project Manager</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --void:#0B0F14;
    --panel:#101720;
    --panel-2:#0D131B;
    --line:#233042;
    --line-active:#3d5872;
    --signal:#5EEAD4;
    --critical:#F5A623;
    --paper:#EDF2F5;
    --muted:#7A8A9B;
    --font-display:'Space Grotesk', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;
    --font-body:'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;
    --font-mono:'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace;
  }

  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{
    margin:0; padding:0; height:100%; width:100%;
    background:var(--void); color:var(--paper);
    font-family:var(--font-body);
    overflow:hidden;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
  }

  /* ---------- Blueprint grid backdrop ---------- */
  #grid{
    position:fixed; inset:0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(var(--line) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--line) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size:56px 56px;
    opacity:0.16;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  #vignette{
    position:fixed; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 35%, var(--void) 92%);
  }

  /* ---------- Stage / world ---------- */
  #stage{
    position:fixed; inset:0;
    overflow:hidden;
    cursor:grab;
    touch-action:none;
  }
  #stage.dragging{ cursor:grabbing; }

  #world{
    position:absolute;
    top:0; left:0;
    width:2800px; height:1900px;
    transform-origin:0 0;
    will-change:transform;
  }
  body:not(.reduced-motion) #world{
    transition:transform .85s cubic-bezier(.22,.9,.24,1);
  }

  svg#edges{
    position:absolute; top:0; left:0;
    width:2800px; height:1900px;
    overflow:visible;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  svg#edges path{
    fill:none;
    stroke:var(--line);
    stroke-width:1.4;
    transition:stroke 0.5s ease;
  }
  svg#edges path.active{
    stroke:var(--line-active);
  }
  svg#edges path.drawn{
    stroke:var(--signal);
  }

  /* ---------- Nodes ---------- */
  .node{
    position:absolute;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    background:none;
    border:none;
    padding:0;
    color:inherit;
    font-family:inherit;
    cursor:pointer;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    opacity:1;
  }
  .node:focus-visible .dot{
    outline:2px solid var(--signal);
    outline-offset:4px;
  }
  .node .dot{
    position:relative;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--paper);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(94,234,212,0);
    transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .35s ease, background .35s ease;
  }
  .node .dot::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    inset:-14px;
  }
  .node.root, .node.branch{
    padding:12px;
  }
  .node.leaf:not(.arc){
    padding-left:12px;
    padding-right:12px;
  }
  .node.leaf.arc{
    padding-top:10px;
    padding-bottom:10px;
  }
  .node .tag{
    font-family:var(--font-mono);
    font-size:10px;
    letter-spacing:.08em;
    color:var(--muted);
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .node .label{
    font-family:var(--font-display);
    font-weight:500;
    white-space:nowrap;
    color:var(--paper);
  }
  .node[data-id="exp"] .label{
    color:#5EEAD4;
  }
  .node:hover .dot, .node:focus-visible .dot{
    transform:scale(1.25);
    box-shadow:0 0 22px 4px rgba(94,234,212,.45);
  }

  .node.root .dot{ width:22px; height:22px; background:var(--signal); box-shadow:0 0 30px 6px rgba(94,234,212,.5);}
  .node.root .label{ font-size:27.5px; font-weight:700; }

  .node.branch .dot{ width:13px; height:13px; }
  .node.branch .label{ font-size:18.75px; }
  .node.branch.active .dot{ background:var(--signal); box-shadow:0 0 20px 4px rgba(94,234,212,.4); }

  .node.leaf .dot{ width:8px; height:8px; background:var(--muted); }
  .node.leaf .label{ font-size:12.5px; color:var(--muted); font-family:var(--font-body); font-weight:400; }
  .node.leaf:hover .dot, .node.leaf:focus-visible .dot{ background:var(--critical); box-shadow:0 0 16px 4px rgba(245,166,35,.5);}
  .node.leaf.open .dot{ background:var(--critical); }
  .node.leaf.open .label{ color:var(--paper); }

  .node.leaf{
    opacity:0;
    transform:translate(-50%,0) scale(.4);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  body:not(.reduced-motion) .node.leaf{
    transition:opacity .5s ease, transform .5s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.3,1.2);
  }
  .node.leaf.visible{
    opacity:1;
    transform:translate(-50%,0) scale(1);
    pointer-events:auto;
  }

  .node.flip{
    flex-direction:column-reverse;
  }
  .node.leaf.flip{
    transform:translate(-50%,-100%) scale(.4);
  }
  .node.leaf.flip.visible{
    transform:translate(-50%,-100%) scale(1);
  }

  .node.arc{
    flex-direction:row;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .node.arc .tag{ display:none; }
  .node.arc .label{ font-size:13px; white-space:nowrap; }
  .node.leaf.arc{
    transform:translate(0,-50%) scale(.4);
  }
  .node.leaf.arc.visible{
    transform:translate(0,-50%) scale(1);
  }

  @keyframes softBlinkOrange{
    0%, 100%{
      background:var(--muted);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(245,166,35,0);
    }
    50%{
      background:var(--critical);
      box-shadow:0 0 12px 5px rgba(245,166,35,.55);
    }
  }
  .dot.pulse{
    animation:softBlinkOrange 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .dot.pulse{ animation:none; background:var(--critical); }
  }

  @keyframes softBlinkPink{
    0%, 100%{
      background:var(--paper);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(255,0,127,0);
    }
    50%{
      background:#FF007F;
      box-shadow:0 0 14px 5px rgba(255,0,127,.55);
    }
  }
  .node[data-id="exp"] .dot{
    animation:softBlinkPink 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .node[data-id="exp"] .dot{ animation:none; background:#FF007F; }
  }

  /* label placement variants so text doesn't collide with dot */
  .lp-top .label, .lp-top .tag{ order:-1; }
  .lp-left{ align-items:flex-end; }
  .lp-right{ align-items:flex-start; }

  /* ---------- Chrome / UI ---------- */
  #wordmark{
    position:fixed;
    top:calc(26px + env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px));
    left:calc(28px + env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px));
    z-index:20;
    font-family:var(--font-display); font-weight:600; font-size:14px;
    letter-spacing:.02em;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    background:none; border:none; color:var(--paper); cursor:pointer;
  }
  #wordmark .dot-mark{
    width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--signal);
    box-shadow:0 0 10px 2px rgba(94,234,212,.6);
  }
  #wordmark span.sub{ color:var(--muted); font-family:var(--font-mono); font-weight:400; font-size:11px; }

  #hint{
    position:fixed;
    bottom:calc(26px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px));
    left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:11px; color:var(--muted);
    letter-spacing:.04em;
    z-index:20;
    opacity:1;
    transition:opacity .6s ease;
    pointer-events:none;
    text-align:center;
  }
  #hint.hidden{ opacity:0; }

  #zoomctl{
    position:fixed;
    bottom:calc(26px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px));
    right:calc(28px + env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px));
    z-index:20;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px;
  }
  #zoomctl button{
    width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:6px;
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line);
    color:var(--paper); font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:15px;
    cursor:pointer;
    touch-action:manipulation;
  }
  #zoomctl button:hover{ border-color:var(--signal); color:var(--signal); }

  /* ---------- Popup panel(s) ---------- */
  #popupStack{
    position:fixed;
    top:50%; right:36px;
    transform:translateY(-50%);
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:16px;
    z-index:30;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  #popupStack.grid5{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 280px);
    grid-auto-rows:auto;
    gap:14px;
    top:50%; left:50%; right:auto;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    max-width:calc(100vw - 48px);
  }
  #popupStack.grid5 .popup{
    width:100%;
  }
  #popupStack.grid5 .popup-body{
    height:130px;
  }
  #popupStack.grid5 h3{
    font-size:16px;
    margin:6px 16px 5px 16px;
  }
  .popup{
    position:static;
    width:360px;
    max-width:calc(100vw - 48px);
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:12px;
    box-shadow:0 30px 60px -20px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
    opacity:0;
    pointer-events:none;
    transform:translateX(24px);
    transition:opacity .35s ease, transform .35s cubic-bezier(.22,.9,.24,1);
  }
  .popup.open{
    opacity:1;
    pointer-events:auto;
    transform:translateX(0);
  }
  .popup-head{
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:16px 18px 0 18px;
  }
  .popup-photo{
    display:block;
    width:96px; height:96px;
    border-radius:50%;
    object-fit:cover;
    margin:22px auto 0 auto;
    border:2px solid var(--signal);
    box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(94,234,212,.4);
  }
  .popup-tag{
    font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.1em;
    color:var(--critical);
  }
  .popup.sec-mode .popup-tag{
    color:var(--muted);
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .popup-close{
    background:none; border:none; color:var(--muted);
    font-size:18px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; padding:2px 4px;
  }
  .popup-close:hover{ color:var(--paper); }
  .popup h3{
    font-family:var(--font-display); font-size:19px; font-weight:600;
    margin:8px 18px 10px 18px;
  }
  .popup.sec-mode h3{
    color:var(--critical);
  }
  .popup-scroll-wrap{
    position:relative;
    margin:0 4px 4px 4px;
  }
  .popup-body{
    height:220px;
    overflow-y:auto;
    padding:22px 18px 22px 18px;
    font-size:14px;
    line-height:1.65;
    color:var(--paper);
    scrollbar-width:thin;
    scrollbar-color:var(--line) transparent;
  }
  .popup-body p{ margin:0 0 12px 0; }
  .popup-body a{ color:var(--signal); }
  .popup-body .fill{ color:var(--muted); font-style:italic; }
  .fade{
    position:absolute; left:0; right:0; height:38px;
    pointer-events:none; z-index:2;
    backdrop-filter:blur(3px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(3px);
  }
  .fade-top{
    top:0;
    background:linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--panel) 15%, transparent);
    mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, transparent 100%);
    -webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, transparent 100%);
  }
  .fade-bottom{
    bottom:0;
    background:linear-gradient(to top, var(--panel) 15%, transparent);
    mask-image:linear-gradient(to top, black 0%, transparent 100%);
    -webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(to top, black 0%, transparent 100%);
  }

  @media (max-width: 640px){
    #wordmark{
      top:calc(18px + env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px));
      left:calc(18px + env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px));
      font-size:13px;
    }
    #wordmark span.sub{ display:none; }

    #zoomctl{
      top:calc(18px + env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px));
      bottom:auto;
      right:calc(18px + env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px));
      flex-direction:row;
    }
    #zoomctl button{
      width:40px; height:40px; font-size:17px;
    }

    #popupStack{
      top:auto; bottom:0; right:0; left:0; transform:none;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:8px;
      padding-bottom:env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px);
    }
    .popup{
      width:auto; max-width:none;
      border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;
      transform:translateY(100%);
    }
    .popup.open{ transform:translateY(0); }
    .popup-body{ height:160px; }
    .popup-close{
      width:36px; height:36px;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    #hint{ font-size:10px; padding:0 20px; }

    #popupStack.grid5{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      top:auto; left:0; right:0; bottom:0; transform:none;
      max-height:82vh;
      overflow-y:auto;
      padding:0 10px calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)) 10px;
    }
    #popupStack.grid5 .popup{
      border-radius:14px;
      transform:translateY(12px);
    }
    #popupStack.grid5 .popup.open{ transform:translateY(0); }

    .node .dot::after{ inset:-18px; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 380px){
    .popup-body{ height:130px; }
    #popupStack.grid5{ max-height:78vh; }
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    #world, .node.leaf, .popup{ transition:none !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="grid"></div>
<div id="vignette"></div>

<button id="wordmark" aria-label="Reset view">
  <span class="dot-mark"></span>
  Amélia Blondin <span class="sub">/ Project Manager</span>
</button>

<div id="hint">drag to explore &nbsp;·&nbsp; click a node to expand &nbsp;·&nbsp; click a lit node for detail</div>

<div id="zoomctl">
  <button id="zin" aria-label="Zoom in">+</button>
  <button id="zout" aria-label="Zoom out">–</button>
</div>

<div id="stage">
  <div id="world">
    <svg id="edges"></svg>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="popupStack">
  <div class="popup" id="popup1" role="dialog" aria-modal="false" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="popup-head">
      <span class="popup-tag" id="popupTag1">NODE</span>
      <button class="popup-close" id="popupClose1" aria-label="Close panel">×</button>
    </div>
    <img class="popup-photo" id="popupPhoto1" src="" alt="" style="display:none;">
    <h3 id="popupTitle1">Title</h3>
    <div class="popup-scroll-wrap">
      <div class="fade fade-top"></div>
      <div class="popup-body" id="popupBody1"></div>
      <div class="fade fade-bottom"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="popup" id="popup2" role="dialog" aria-modal="false" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="popup-head">
      <span class="popup-tag" id="popupTag2">NODE</span>
      <button class="popup-close" id="popupClose2" aria-label="Close panel">×</button>
    </div>
    <h3 id="popupTitle2">Title</h3>
    <div class="popup-scroll-wrap">
      <div class="fade fade-top"></div>
      <div class="popup-body" id="popupBody2"></div>
      <div class="fade fade-bottom"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="popup" id="popup3" role="dialog" aria-modal="false" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="popup-head">
      <span class="popup-tag" id="popupTag3">NODE</span>
      <button class="popup-close" id="popupClose3" aria-label="Close panel">×</button>
    </div>
    <h3 id="popupTitle3">Title</h3>
    <div class="popup-scroll-wrap">
      <div class="fade fade-top"></div>
      <div class="popup-body" id="popupBody3"></div>
      <div class="fade fade-bottom"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="popup" id="popup4" role="dialog" aria-modal="false" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="popup-head">
      <span class="popup-tag" id="popupTag4">NODE</span>
      <button class="popup-close" id="popupClose4" aria-label="Close panel">×</button>
    </div>
    <h3 id="popupTitle4">Title</h3>
    <div class="popup-scroll-wrap">
      <div class="fade fade-top"></div>
      <div class="popup-body" id="popupBody4"></div>
      <div class="fade fade-bottom"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="popup" id="popup5" role="dialog" aria-modal="false" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="popup-head">
      <span class="popup-tag" id="popupTag5">NODE</span>
      <button class="popup-close" id="popupClose5" aria-label="Close panel">×</button>
    </div>
    <h3 id="popupTitle5">Title</h3>
    <div class="popup-scroll-wrap">
      <div class="fade fade-top"></div>
      <div class="popup-body" id="popupBody5"></div>
      <div class="fade fade-bottom"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
/* ============================================================
   REPLACE-ME MAP
   Every string marked with [REPLACE] is placeholder copy.
   Swap in your real project details, dates, and links.
   Node positions (x,y) live in a 2400x1600 world — nudge them
   freely, nothing else depends on exact coordinates.
   ============================================================ */

const PROFILE_PHOTO = "data:image/png;base64,";

const DATA = [
  { id:'root', level:'root', x:1350, y:900, tag:'START', label:'Amélia Blondin', labelPos:'top' },

  // ---- Branches ----
  { id:'about', level:'branch', parent:'root', x:975, y:675, tag:'PROFILE', label:'About', labelPos:'left' },
  { id:'exp',   level:'branch', parent:'root', x:1838, y:615, tag:'DELIVERED', label:'Track Record', labelPos:'right' },
  { id:'skills',level:'branch', parent:'root', x:1950, y:1200, tag:'STRENGTHS', label:'Key Strengths', labelPos:'right' },
  { id:'pmp',   level:'branch', parent:'root', x:1298, y:1410, tag:'PMP · 2026', label:'Certification', labelPos:'top' },
  { id:'contact',level:'branch', parent:'root', x:750, y:1163, tag:'CONNECT', label:'Contact', labelPos:'left' },

  // ---- About leaves ----
  { id:'a1', level:'leaf', parent:'about', x:605, y:455, tag:'STARTING POINT', noPrefix:true, label:'Background',
    body:`<p>I lead digital transformation initiatives for Thermomix Canada/US as Head of Digital & Brand. My first enterprise-scale project — the Global Digital Experience Transformation — meant building governance practices, aligning stakeholders across departments, and navigating a complex organization, with no formal PM training in place yet.</p>
    <p>That project succeeded on judgment: influence, conflict resolution, executive trust, and a fast learning curve. The PMP, completed in 2026, gave that judgment a name and a framework.</p>` },
  { id:'a2', level:'leaf', parent:'about', x:465, y:835, tag:'TURNING POINT', noPrefix:true, label:'The Shift',
    body:`<p>The PMP gave me vocabulary, frameworks, tools, risk thinking, governance, and planning techniques — things I'd been building through trial by fire. What it didn't need to give me, because I already had it, was the judgment that made the projects succeed: influence, conflict resolution, executive trust, fast adaptation.</p>
    <p>This map exists to make that case: four transformation initiatives, each one project management work first, wrapped inside a marketing title.</p>` },

  // ---- Experience leaves ----
  { id:'e1', level:'leaf', parent:'exp', x:1958, y:365, tag:'Project 1', noPrefix:true, flip:true, pulse:true, label:'Global Digital Experience Transformation',
    sections:{
      context:`<p>A major product launch overwhelmed the existing platform — the website crashed under moderate traffic, exposing that the digital infrastructure couldn't support growth.</p>`,
      role:`<p>PM for the full transformation end to end, business case through go-live, while also acting as Business Lead for the Digital Customer Experience workstream.</p>`,
      scope:`<p>Shopify implementation, full site + CMS migration, data warehouse and inventory integration, customer accounts, marketing automation, payments, analytics, SEO, a new loyalty program, and a new reviews platform — across Canada and the U.S.</p>`,
      outcomes:`<p>Delivered on schedule in both markets. Platform performance up 150%. Checkout capacity scaled from under 1,000 to 10,000+ per minute. Marketing/ops effort cut 50%+ through automation.</p>`,
      lesson:`<p>With PMP frameworks in hand today, I'd formalize governance and risk management from day one instead of building it as I went.</p>`
    } },
  { id:'e2', level:'leaf', parent:'exp', x:2288, y:395, tag:'Project 2', noPrefix:true, flip:true, pulse:true, label:'Digital Customer Experience Transformation',
    sections:{
      context:`<p>The existing site didn't reflect Thermomix's premium positioning or explain a genuinely complex product. This was the customer-facing workstream inside the larger platform transformation.</p>`,
      role:`<p>Business Lead for the redesign — translating business needs into deliverables for designers, developers and external agencies, and defending brand consistency throughout.</p>`,
      scope:`<p>Full redesign, UX and customer journey, information architecture, content strategy, creative direction, SEO — coordinated across internal teams and external creative/dev agencies.</p>`,
      outcomes:`<p>Delivered the flagship experience for Canada/U.S., later adopted as the design benchmark for other Thermomix markets.</p>`,
      lesson:`<p>Bring deep product-knowledge SMEs in earlier — strong UX/UI talent isn't a substitute for someone who knows the product cold. Would have cut iteration time.</p>`
    } },
  { id:'e3', level:'leaf', parent:'exp', x:2398, y:685, tag:'Project 3', noPrefix:true, flip:true, pulse:true, label:'TM7 Product Launch Readiness',
    sections:{
      context:`<p>Thermomix launches a new generation roughly every five years. The TM7 launch needed every customer and consultant touchpoint ready on a fixed date.</p>`,
      role:`<p>Owned the Brand & Marketing launch plan for Canada and coordinated the digital workstream — aligning Marketing, IT, Operations and executive stakeholders, tracking dependencies, reporting risk up the chain.</p>`,
      scope:`<p>Website updates, product content, PPC readiness, consultant touchpoints, cross-functional launch coordination.</p>`,
      outcomes:`<p>Launched on schedule across every touchpoint. Canada posted its highest annual sales in company history in 2025 and was named Gold Market.</p>`,
      lesson:`<p>A PM's job isn't only running the work — it's translating technical complexity into language stakeholders can act on.</p>`
    } },
  { id:'e4', level:'leaf', parent:'exp', x:2218, y:895, tag:'Project 4', noPrefix:true, pulse:true, label:'Communication Ecosystem Transformation',
    sections:{
      context:`<p>The TM7 launch meant every automated customer and consultant communication needed rebuilding — flows that had accumulated without a clear map.</p>`,
      role:`<p>Led the audit and rebuild — mapped existing journeys, designed the new structure, coordinated Legal, Marketing, IT, Sales and Ops to keep messaging consistent.</p>`,
      scope:`<p>Automated email journeys across two platforms, content mapping, CMS updates, launch messaging for two distinct audiences.</p>`,
      outcomes:`<p>Built a scalable, segmented communication system and a repeatable framework future launches now reuse.</p>`,
      lesson:`<p>Treat communication flows as a project system with real dependencies, not a pile of content updates — mapping the ecosystem early is what de-risks it.</p>`
    } },

  // ---- Key Strengths leaves ----
  { id:'s1', level:'leaf', parent:'skills', x:2300, y:1020, tag:'STRENGTH 01', noPrefix:true, label:'Business Strategy',
    body:`<p>Researched, documented and presented the business case for Shopify as Thermomix's platform going forward — the strategic call the rest of the transformation was built on.</p>` },
  { id:'s2', level:'leaf', parent:'skills', x:2420, y:1220, tag:'STRENGTH 02', noPrefix:true, label:'Stakeholder Alignment',
    body:`<p>Built alignment among executives, marketing, IT, ops and external agencies — repeatedly, across four transformation initiatives with different stakeholders and different priorities each time.</p>` },
  { id:'s3', level:'leaf', parent:'skills', x:2360, y:1440, tag:'STRENGTH 03', noPrefix:true, label:'Decision Making',
    body:`<p>Recognized the platform wasn't scalable before anyone else flagged it, and built internal support before asking for executive approval — not after.</p>` },
  { id:'s4', level:'leaf', parent:'skills', x:2100, y:1520, tag:'STRENGTH 04', noPrefix:true, label:'Team Leadership',
    body:`<p>Led the Brand & Marketing team through the TM7 launch plan for Canada, and coordinated cross-functional teams that didn't report to me on every other initiative.</p>` },
  { id:'s5', level:'leaf', parent:'skills', x:1850, y:1480, tag:'STRENGTH 05', noPrefix:true, label:'Execution',
    body:`<p>Delivered every initiative on schedule — including a global platform migration with zero prior enterprise-scale PM experience going in.</p>` },

  // ---- Certification leaves ----
  { id:'p1', level:'leaf', parent:'pmp', x:1018, y:1570, tag:'12', label:'PMP, 2026',
    body:`<p>Project Management Professional (PMP®)<br><b>Issuing body:</b> Project Management Institute (PMI)<br><b>Certified:</b> June 2026</p>
    <p><b>Credential ID:</b> #4428708</p>` },
  { id:'p2', level:'leaf', parent:'pmp', x:1538, y:1590, tag:'13', label:'What PMP Added',
    body:`<p>Vocabulary. Frameworks. Tools. Risk thinking. Governance. Planning techniques.</p>
    <p>What it didn't need to add: the judgment. The projects on this map succeeded because I could influence, resolve conflict, earn executive trust, and adapt fast — before I had a name for any of it. The PMP is the formal layer on top of instincts already tested under an enterprise-scale launch.</p>` },

];

const byId = Object.fromEntries(DATA.map(d => [d.id, d]));
const edgesEl = document.getElementById('edges');
const worldEl = document.getElementById('world');
const stageEl = document.getElementById('stage');

const reduceMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
if (reduceMotion) document.body.classList.add('reduced-motion');

/* ---------------- Build edges ---------------- */
DATA.forEach(n => {
  if (!n.parent || n.arc) return;
  const p = byId[n.parent];
  const path = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');
  const trim = n.level === 'leaf' ? 0.95 : 1;
  const ex = p.x + (n.x - p.x) * trim;
  const ey = p.y + (n.y - p.y) * trim;
  const d = `M ${p.x} ${p.y} L ${ex} ${ey}`;
  path.setAttribute('d', d);
  path.dataset.child = n.id;
  path.dataset.parentLevel = n.level;
  const len = Math.hypot(ex - p.x, ey - p.y);
  path.style.strokeDasharray = len;
  path.style.strokeDashoffset = n.level === 'leaf' ? len : 0;
  if (!reduceMotion) path.style.transition = 'stroke-dashoffset .6s ease, stroke .4s ease';
  edgesEl.appendChild(path);
  n._edge = path;
});

/* ---------------- Build nodes ---------------- */
DATA.forEach(n => {
  const btn = document.createElement('button');
  btn.className = `node ${n.level}`;
  btn.dataset.id = n.id;
  btn.style.left = n.x + 'px';
  btn.style.top = n.y + 'px';
  if (n.labelPos === 'top') btn.classList.add('lp-top');
  if (n.labelPos === 'left') btn.classList.add('lp-left');
  if (n.labelPos === 'right') btn.classList.add('lp-right');
  if (n.flip) btn.classList.add('flip');
  if (n.arc) btn.classList.add('arc');

  const dot = document.createElement('span');
  dot.className = 'dot' + (n.pulse ? ' pulse' : '');
  const tag = document.createElement('span');
  tag.className = 'tag';
  tag.textContent = n.tag;
  const label = document.createElement('span');
  label.className = 'label';
  label.textContent = n.label;

  if (n.labelPos === 'top') {
    btn.append(dot, label, tag);
  } else {
    btn.append(dot, tag, label);
  }

  btn.setAttribute('aria-label', n.label);
  worldEl.appendChild(btn);
  n._el = btn;

  btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    onNodeClick(n);
  });
});

/* ---------------- State ---------------- */
let view = { x: 0, y: 0, scale: 1 };
let focused = null;
let hintShown = true;

function applyView(animated = true) {
  worldEl.style.transform = `translate(${view.x}px, ${view.y}px) scale(${view.scale})`;
}

function baseScaleFor(vw){
  if (vw < 480) return 0.32;
  if (vw < 640) return 0.4;
  if (vw < 900) return 0.5;
  return 0.6;
}

function centerOn(node, targetScale = 1.25) {
  const vw = window.innerWidth, vh = window.innerHeight;
  const scale = vw < 640 ? Math.min(targetScale, 0.85) : targetScale;
  view.scale = scale;
  view.x = vw / 2 - node.x * scale;
  view.y = vh / 2 - node.y * scale;
  applyView();
}

function resetView() {
  const root = byId.root;
  view.scale = baseScaleFor(window.innerWidth);
  view.x = window.innerWidth / 2 - root.x * view.scale;
  view.y = window.innerHeight / 2 - root.y * view.scale;
  applyView();
}

function dismissHint(){
  if (!hintShown) return;
  hintShown = false;
  document.getElementById('hint').classList.add('hidden');
}

function collapseBranch(id) {
  DATA.filter(n => n.parent === id).forEach(leaf => {
    leaf._el.classList.remove('visible');
    if (leaf._edge) {
      leaf._edge.style.strokeDashoffset = leaf._edge.style.strokeDasharray;
      leaf._edge.classList.remove('drawn');
    }
  });
  const b = byId[id];
  if (b) { b._el.classList.remove('active'); b._edge && b._edge.classList.remove('active'); }
}

function collapseAll() {
  DATA.filter(n => n.level === 'branch').forEach(b => collapseBranch(b.id));
  focused = null;
}

function expandBranch(node) {
  if (focused && focused !== node.id) collapseBranch(focused);
  focused = node.id;
  node._el.classList.add('active');
  if (node._edge) node._edge.classList.add('active');

  const leaves = DATA.filter(n => n.parent === node.id);
  leaves.forEach((leaf, i) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      leaf._el.classList.add('visible');
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        if (leaf._edge) {
          leaf._edge.style.strokeDashoffset = 0;
          leaf._edge.classList.add('drawn');
        }
      });
    }, reduceMotion ? 0 : i * 90);
  });
}

function onNodeClick(node) {
  dismissHint();
  if (node.level === 'root') {
    collapseAll();
    resetView();
    setActiveSlots([1]);
    popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
    openPopup({
      tag: 'PROFILE',
      label: 'Amélia Blondin',
      photo: PROFILE_PHOTO,
      body: `<p><b>Amélia Blondin</b> — Project Manager, PMP (2026).</p>
      <p>Formerly Head of Digital & Brand at Thermomix Canada/US, where I led enterprise-scale digital transformation initiatives — platform migrations, product launches, and the systems behind them.</p>
      <p>This map walks through four of those projects, reframed as what they always were underneath the marketing title: project management work. Drag to explore, click a node to open it.</p>`
    }, 1);
    return;
  }
  if (node.id === 'about') {
    if (focused && focused !== node.id) collapseBranch(focused);
    focused = node.id;
    node._el.classList.add('active');
    if (node._edge) node._edge.classList.add('active');
    centerOn(node, 1.15);
    popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
    setActiveSlots([1, 2]);
    const leaves = DATA.filter(n => n.parent === 'about');
    if (leaves[0]) openPopup(leaves[0], 1);
    if (leaves[1]) openPopup(leaves[1], 2);
    return;
  }
  if (node.id === 'pmp') {
    if (focused && focused !== node.id) collapseBranch(focused);
    focused = node.id;
    node._el.classList.add('active');
    if (node._edge) node._edge.classList.add('active');
    centerOn(node, 1.15);
    popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
    setActiveSlots([1, 2]);
    const leaves = DATA.filter(n => n.parent === 'pmp');
    if (leaves[0]) openPopup(leaves[0], 1);
    if (leaves[1]) openPopup(leaves[1], 2);
    return;
  }
  if (node.id === 'skills') {
    const isOpen = popups[1].el.classList.contains('open') && focused === 'skills';
    if (isOpen) {
      closePopup();
      popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
      collapseBranch('skills');
      focused = null;
      resetView();
      return;
    }
    if (focused && focused !== node.id) collapseBranch(focused);
    focused = node.id;
    node._el.classList.add('active');
    if (node._edge) node._edge.classList.add('active');
    centerOn(node, 1.05);
    popupStackEl.classList.add('grid5');
    setActiveSlots([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]);
    const leaves = DATA.filter(n => n.parent === 'skills');
    leaves.forEach((leaf, i) => openPopup(leaf, i + 1));
    return;
  }
  if (node.id === 'contact') {
    if (focused && focused !== node.id) collapseBranch(focused);
    focused = node.id;
    node._el.classList.add('active');
    if (node._edge) node._edge.classList.add('active');
    centerOn(node, 1.15);
    popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
    setActiveSlots([1]);
    openPopup({
      tag: "LET'S CONNECT",
      label: 'Contact Info',
      noPrefix: true,
      body: `<p><b>Amélia Blondin</b></p>
      <p>+1 (438) 406-1232</p>
      <p><a href="mailto:amelia.l.blondin@gmail.com">amelia.l.blondin@gmail.com</a></p>
      <p><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/am%C3%A9lia-blondin-pmp%C2%AE-a80b34b3/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="text-decoration:underline;">LinkedIn</a></p>`
    }, 1);
    return;
  }
  if (node.level === 'branch') {
    closePopup();
    popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
    if (focused === node.id) {
      collapseBranch(node.id);
      focused = null;
      resetView();
    } else {
      expandBranch(node);
      centerOn(node, 1.15);
    }
    return;
  }
  if (node.level === 'leaf' && node.sections) {
    const alreadyOpen = popups[1].openId === node.id && popups[1].el.classList.contains('open');
    if (alreadyOpen) {
      closePopup();
      popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
      return;
    }
    popupStackEl.classList.add('grid5');
    setActiveSlots([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]);
    const order = [
      ['Context', node.sections.context],
      ['Role', node.sections.role],
      ['Scope', node.sections.scope],
      ['Outcomes', node.sections.outcomes],
      ['Lesson Learned', node.sections.lesson]
    ];
    order.forEach(([tag, body], i) => {
      openPopup({ id: node.id, _el: node._el, tag: node.label, noPrefix: true, secMode: true, label: tag, body }, i + 1);
    });
    return;
  }
  if (node.level === 'leaf') {
    popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
    setActiveSlots([1]);
    openPopup(node, 1);
  }
}

/* ---------------- Popup ---------------- */
const popupStackEl = document.getElementById('popupStack');
const popups = {};
for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
  popups[i] = {
    el: document.getElementById('popup' + i),
    tag: document.getElementById('popupTag' + i),
    title: document.getElementById('popupTitle' + i),
    body: document.getElementById('popupBody' + i),
    photo: document.getElementById('popupPhoto' + i) || null,
    openId: null
  };
}

function setActiveSlots(slots) {
  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    popups[i].el.style.display = slots.includes(i) ? '' : 'none';
    if (!slots.includes(i)) closePopup(i);
  }
}

function openPopup(node, slot = 1) {
  const p = popups[slot];
  if (p.openId) { const prev = byId[p.openId]; if (prev && prev._el) prev._el.classList.remove('open'); p.openId = null; }
  if (node._el) {
    p.openId = node.id;
    node._el.classList.add('open');
  }
  p.tag.textContent = (node.photo || node.noPrefix) ? node.tag : 'NODE ' + node.tag;
  p.title.textContent = node.label;
  p.body.innerHTML = node.body;
  p.body.scrollTop = 0;
  p.el.classList.toggle('sec-mode', !!node.secMode);
  if (p.photo) {
    if (node.photo) {
      p.photo.src = node.photo;
      p.photo.alt = node.label;
      p.photo.style.display = 'block';
    } else {
      p.photo.style.display = 'none';
      p.photo.src = '';
    }
  }
  p.el.classList.add('open');
  p.el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
}

function closePopup(slot) {
  if (slot === undefined) { for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) closePopup(i); return; }
  const p = popups[slot];
  p.el.classList.remove('open');
  p.el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
  if (p.openId) { const prev = byId[p.openId]; if (prev && prev._el) prev._el.classList.remove('open'); p.openId = null; }
}

for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
  document.getElementById('popupClose' + i).addEventListener('click', () => closePopup(i));
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closePopup(); });

/* ---------------- Pan (drag) ---------------- */
let dragCandidate = false, dragging = false, lastX = 0, lastY = 0, moved = false, activePointerId = null;

stageEl.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {
  if (e.target.closest('.node') || e.target.closest('.popup')) return;
  dragCandidate = true;
  dragging = false;
  moved = false;
  lastX = e.clientX; lastY = e.clientY;
  activePointerId = e.pointerId;
});

stageEl.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {
  if (!dragCandidate) return;
  const dx = e.clientX - lastX, dy = e.clientY - lastY;
  if (!dragging) {
    if (Math.abs(dx) + Math.abs(dy) <= 3) return;
    dragging = true;
    moved = true;
    stageEl.classList.add('dragging');
    try { stageEl.setPointerCapture(activePointerId); } catch (err) {}
  }
  view.x += dx; view.y += dy;
  lastX = e.clientX; lastY = e.clientY;
  worldEl.style.transition = 'none';
  applyView();
});

function endDrag(e) {
  dragCandidate = false;
  if (!dragging) return;
  dragging = false;
  stageEl.classList.remove('dragging');
  worldEl.style.transition = '';
  dismissHint();
}
stageEl.addEventListener('pointerup', endDrag);
stageEl.addEventListener('pointercancel', endDrag);

stageEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  if (moved) return;
  if (e.target.closest('.node') || e.target.closest('.popup')) return;
  closePopup();
  popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
  if (focused === 'skills' || focused === 'about' || focused === 'pmp' || focused === 'contact') {
    collapseBranch(focused);
    focused = null;
    resetView();
  } else if (focused === 'exp') {
    centerOn(byId['exp'], 1.15);
  }
});

/* ---------------- Zoom ---------------- */
function zoomBy(factor) {
  const vw = window.innerWidth, vh = window.innerHeight;
  const cx = vw / 2, cy = vh / 2;
  const wx = (cx - view.x) / view.scale;
  const wy = (cy - view.y) / view.scale;
  const minScale = vw < 640 ? 0.22 : 0.4;
  view.scale = Math.min(2.2, Math.max(minScale, view.scale * factor));
  view.x = cx - wx * view.scale;
  view.y = cy - wy * view.scale;
  applyView();
}

stageEl.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  dismissHint();
  zoomBy(e.deltaY < 0 ? 1.1 : 0.9);
}, { passive: false });

document.getElementById('zin').addEventListener('click', () => zoomBy(1.15));
document.getElementById('zout').addEventListener('click', () => zoomBy(0.87));

document.getElementById('wordmark').addEventListener('click', () => {
  closePopup(); collapseAll(); resetView(); popupStackEl.classList.remove('grid5');
});

/* ---------------- Init ---------------- */
window.addEventListener('resize', () => { if (!focused) resetView(); });
resetView();
</script>
</body>
</html>
